titles.text: Ganbare Goemon: Mononoke Douchuu Tobidase Nabe-Bugyou!
がんばれゴエモン もののけ道中 飛び出せ鍋奉行!

descriptions.text: Ganbare Goemon: Mononoke Dōchū Tobidase Nabe-Bugyō! (がんばれゴエモン〜もののけ道中 飛び出せ鍋奉行!〜; lit. "On the Way to Mononoke, Jump Out and be a Nabe Magistrate!) is a role-playing video game developed by Konami Computer Entertainment Kobe and released by Konami for the Game Boy Color on December 16, 1999. It is the seventeenth installment in the Ganbare Goemon series overall.
